name: Unity IAP receipt validation
policy: Validate local receipt structure before fulfillment and send receipt to server when available.

name: Google Play Billing validation
policy: Store purchase token and verify entitlement before granting durable value.

name: Apple StoreKit restore
policy: Provide restore flow for non-consumables and subscriptions.

name: Pending purchase queue
policy: Do not grant product until store reports completed purchase and receipt exists.

name: Idempotent fulfillment
policy: Track transaction ids so retry or restore cannot duplicate rewards.

name: Visible restore purchases button
policy: Expose purchase restore in settings and package screen.
